arts.ttl: Champions League PREVIEW | Borussia Dortmund (0) vs (4) Barcelona
arts.sum: Last season’s UEFA Champions League runners-up Borussia Dortmund need a miracle in the quarter-final second leg this time out as they trail Barcelona 4-0 heading into Tuesday’s clash at the…

arts.ttl: Dortmund honing in on 17-year-old Argentine talent
arts.sum: Die Schwarzgelben are believed to be leading the charge ahead of Leverkusen for the highly-rated teen.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick: 'I have a lot of faith in my team'
arts.sum: There is a lot of quality in our team and we always take things a game at a time. Playing Dortmund in the Champions League quarter finals at their stadium is always going to be difficult.

arts.ttl: Official: One return as Barcelona name squad to face Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: The squad of players set to be depended upon by La Liga giants Barcelona for their upcoming meeting with Borussia Dortmund has on Monday been unveiled. Barcelona are of course…

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea leading the charge for BVB's want-away winger
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens could be set for pastures new closer to the player's home after the season ends.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona: Prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Barca ran riot in the first leg and are overwhelming favourites to reach the semi-final

arts.ttl: Niko Kovac ahead of Barcelona fixture: “We want to show a different face and win the game”
arts.sum: On Tuesday night, Borussia Dortmund will face Barcelona at Signal Iduna Park for the Champions League quarter-final second leg as the hosts look to recover their 4-0 deficit from the…

arts.ttl: In Black-and-Yellow and Blaugrana: the players to have featured for Borussia Dortmund and Barcelona
arts.sum: Going on to win the Bundesliga title a further eight times at Bayern Munich - where he was also crowned a European champion - Lewandowski, now 36, continues to rack up the goals for his current club. Playing in one of the division's most celebrated teams coached by Jürgen Klopp, the Polish marksman registered 103 goals in 187 appearances in all competitions for Die Schwarzgelben as he twice won the top-flight title and picked up a league and DFB Cup double in 2011/12.

arts.ttl: Dortmund midfielder set for snub against Barcelona, Sky reports
arts.sum: The 28-year-old has had an underwhelming season by his standards and could be left on the bench this Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Kovac reveals Emre Can a doubt for Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund captain Emre Can is struggling with muscular problems ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash with FC Barcelona, Niko Kovac revealed on Monday.
